infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Mongchi can use your camera when you choose to take a pet photo for avatar creation.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Mongchi uses a pet photo you choose to create your tiny avatar.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Mongchi can save pet share images only when you ask it to.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Mongchi can use approximate location when you choose local weather scenes for your pet garden.
